falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's expected bearish continuation, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 50% above the 30-day average during a confirmed price breakout above key resistance
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained high-volume breakouts indicate institutional buying, refuting the pattern's assumption of a bearish blowoff.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score decreases below 25 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A declining blowoff score suggests waning speculative pressure, directly contradicting the pattern's 38-score baseline and invalidating the current call.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
